title: Telepathy
wikitext:
[[File:Telepathy-Experiment-Is-No-Trick-Mind-Reading-Technology-Allows-Anyone-To-Be-X-Men-665x385.jpg|right|400px]]

==Summary==
'''Telepathy''' is the ability to transmit one's thoughts and feelings to another person at a distance without using other conventional means of communication. It can also allow for mind reading in certain cases, and is often associated with [[Mind Manipulation]].

==Users==
*[[Teridax]] and other [[:Category:Makuta|Makuta]], among others ([[Bionicle]])
*[[Son Goku]], [[King Kai]], and others ([[Dragon Ball]])
*[[Charles Xavier]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Mewtwo]] and other Psychic Pokémon ([[Pokémon]])
*Force Users ([[Star Wars]])
*[[Reisen Udongein Inaba]], [[Rei'sen]], and [[Satori Komeiji]] ([[Touhou Project]])
*Psykers ([[Warhammer 40,000]])
